trial_title: A Study to Investigate Weight Management With Macupatide and Eloralintide, Alone or in Combination, in Adult Participants With Obesity or Overweight

base_criteria.original_text: Have a body mass index (BMI) ≥30 kg/m², or ≥27 kg/m² with at least 1 weight-related comorbidity
base_criteria.normalized_text: BMI must be ≥30 kg/m² OR (≥27 kg/m² AND ≥1 weight-related comorbidity)

base_criteria.original_text: Have had a stable body weight for the 3 months prior to randomization (<5% body weight gain and/or loss)
Have type 1 diabetes mellitus or type 2 diabetes mellitus

base_criteria.normalized_text: No uncontrolled hypertension (should be on treatment if present)

base_criteria.original_text: Have signs and symptoms of any liver disease other than nonalcoholic fatty liver disease
base_criteria.normalized_text: No active liver disease except NAFLD

base_criteria.original_text: Have any of the following cardiovascular conditions within 3 months prior to screening: acute myocardial infarction, cerebrovascular accident (stroke), unstable angina, or hospitalization due to congestive heart failure
base_criteria.normalized_text: No acute MI, stroke, unstable angina, or CHF hospitalization within 3 months

base_criteria.original_text: Have a history of symptomatic gallbladder disease within the past 2 years
base_criteria.normalized_text: No symptomatic gallbladder disease within 2 years

base_criteria.original_text: Have a history of acute or chronic pancreatitis
base_criteria.normalized_text: No history of acute or chronic pancreatitis

base_criteria.original_text: Have an elevated resting pulse rate (>100 bpm) or reduced resting pulse rate (<60 bpm)
Have a lifetime history of suicide attempts
base_criteria.normalized_text: No lifetime history of suicide attempts
